category_sources: Official NetBSD source and manual pages identify it as the ftp client / Internet file transfer program.
source_facts.description says tnftp is NetBSD's FTP client.
display_name_sources: Official NetBSD tnftp distribution path and archive names use tnftp.
docs_sources: Official NetBSD manual page for ftp(1) is the best command documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official NetBSD tnftp distribution directory.
repo_sources: NetBSD wiki documents github.com/NetBSD as official read-only copies of src, xsrc, and pkgsrc.
tnftp corresponds to the NetBSD src usr.bin/ftp source directory rather than a standalone project repository.
tags_sources: Official NetBSD manual page documents ftp as an Internet file transfer program.
